title: AI Agent Loop is Here. And it Changes Everything - Here's How.
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses the implications of AI agent loops, comparing Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models and examining capabilities including recursive self-improvement, long-running task memory, and agentic payments. The video covers loop engineering patterns, price elasticity in AI, and emerging builder opportunities in regulated industries.
writeup: Cyril Imhof breaks down AI agent loops, the pattern where an agent runs continuously rather than completing a single prompt and stopping. The video compares the Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models across capabilities including recursive self-improvement, long-running task memory, and agentic payments. It covers loop engineering patterns and price elasticity in AI, and it points to builder opportunities in regulated industries.
